name: Entry
description: Runloop iteration begins; 提示-建置 invoked

name: ParseMarkers
description: 解析 上下文markers 來自 recent 助手 messages (Layer 5 pre-pass)
actions: Apply recall → load disk content + journal-tail append

name: MaterialisePinnedZone
description: Wrap each 已釘選 工具結果 作為 使用者-role 訊息 envelope (DD-4)
actions: For each pin: synth user message [Pinned earlier output] tool X (round K)...

name: ComputeStatus
description: 建置 上下文狀態 區塊 (R-5)

name: AssemblePrompt
description: Five-zone canonical assembly (DD-1)

name: OverflowGate
description: 壓縮-redesign overflow gate evaluates fit
actions: If prompt fits per-request budget AND pinned_zone <= cap → S6

name: DispatchToolOrLLM
description: Send 提示 到 LLM 或 派發 工具
actions: AI may emit ContextMarkers in next message (loops back via S1)

name: ToolInvocation
description: 工具-side bound: ctx.輸出budget applied (Layer 2)

name: RoundComplete
description: 追加 round 到 journal (追加-僅)

name: RoundExit
description: 返回 控制 到 runloop

name: EnterCompaction
description: 壓縮 triggered (overflow gate OR 已釘選zone over cap OR voluntary)

name: DecideMode
description: Choose Phase 1 或 Phase 2

name: Phase1
description: Phase 1 LLM compact (DD-3, DD-11)
actions: Build LLMCompactRequest{phase:1, strict:false, priorAnchor, journalUnpinned, dropMarkers, targetTokens}
Choose internalMode: single-pass vs chunk-and-merge by input size

name: Phase2
description: Phase 2 fail-safe LLM compact (DD-9)
actions: Build LLMCompactRequest{phase:2, strict:true, priorAnchor, journalAll+pinnedZone, targetTokens=5000}

name: SanityCheck
description: Validate 輸出 (DD-6)
actions: Check anchor body shape (Markdown only, v1 header, no provider tokens)
If fail → S15 retry; if pass → S17

name: RetryStricter
description: Single 重試 使用 stricter framing

name: FallbackPath
description: Graceful degradation (DD-6)
actions: Else: keepPriorAnchor + truncateJournalFromOldest until prompt fits

name: WriteAnchor
description: 持久化 new anchor 到 訊息 串流

name: PostCompactionFitCheck
description: Re-evaluate 提示 fit after 壓縮
actions: If Phase 1 result still over budget AND pinned_zone non-empty → S13 (escalate to Phase 2)
If Phase 2 result still over → S19 (unrecoverable)

name: UnrecoverableExit
description: Bounded chain exhausted; raise 到 runloop (無 Phase 3)
actions: Raise E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE with user-facing remediation message

name: VoluntarySummarize
description: compactnow 工具 handler (R-6, DD-14)
actions: Branch to S10 with voluntary flag

name: EmitTelemetry
description: Synchronous 壓縮事件 發出 (R-13)

name: CompactionDone
description: 返回 到 runloop; 回到 到 提示-建置 供 下一個 round
actions: If voluntary: return tool_result {room_remaining_after, anchor_size, status} to AI
Loop back to S0 for next round
